in_progress.title: Tech debt pass — ship a real src/ change to trigger deploy

in_progress.title: T-001 — run and report this cycle
in_progress.manager_instruction: Run: node scripts/t001-run.js (cwd: /repo-observer). Report full output in QA_REPORT.md. Expected: 17/18. E2 (smoke badge) will clear once Operator's deploy goes live. If 18/18 after deploy, declare T-001 FULL PASS.
